channel.title: Posts on Marcu Leancă
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Marcu Leancă

item.title: small updates
item.description: why i mainly decided to write this just to show future me my focus time on forest. ye i be cool like that. ye be cool like that ngl. . I mean yeah, you can see i got 225 mins. which is almost 4 hours! wait let me fact check that… yeah, so its 3hrs and 45mins. pretty cool innit? she this ain’t really a section but i just wanted to say that she was nice to me today nd i was

item.title: First post (obv!)
item.description: why I had this pages site for some time, like a month now, but it was just a nice page with my name on it. I decided to switch to this (hugo) cause i wanted to make an easy to mentain blog. This isn’t targetting any audience really, it’s just targetting future me. I haven’t yet finished seting this site up. I’m using the papermod theme, i would link it, but it has 8k+ stars on github so idk if it’s needed.
